ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the team belongs to */,
  "home_stadium" TEXT /* Home stadium of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the statistic belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistic belongs to */,
  "played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "win" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "loss" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "draw" INTEGER /* Number of draws */,
  "runs_for" INTEGER /* Total runs scored */,
  "runs_against" INTEGER /* Total runs allowed */,
  "runs_difference" INTEGER /* Run difference (runs_for - runs_against) */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Win percentage (win / played) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the commissioner */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_divisions_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team in the game */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team in the game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "team1_score" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "team2_score" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., regular season, playoff) */,
  "inning_count" INTEGER /* Number of innings played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, coach) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user in the session */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_batting_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batting statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "at_bats" INTEGER /* Number of at-bats */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Number of hits */,
  "runs" INTEGER /* Number of runs scored */,
  "rbis" INTEGER /* Number of runs batted in */,
  "walks" INTEGER /* Number of walks */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_batting_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_batting_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
